languages.text: "Неумирающий уже прошептал его имя. А рука Домин даровала ему высшую награду из возможных".
"The Undying One had already whispered his name. And the Domin's hand bestowed upon him the greatest of all honours."
languages.original_text: "Неумирающий уже прошептал его имя. А рука Домин даровала ему высшую награду из возможных".

traits.locale_text: "The Undying One has already whispered his name. And the Domin's hand bestowed upon him the greatest of all honors."
"The Undying One has already whispered his name. And the Domin's hand bestowed upon him the greatest of all honors."
"The Undying One has already whispered his name. And the Domin's hand bestowed upon him the greatest of all honours."
"The Undying One has already whispered his name. And the Domin's hand bestowed upon him the greatest of all honours."
"The Undying One had already whispered his name. And the Domin's hand bestowed upon him the greatest of all honours."

languages.text: “不死之神已悄然道出他的名字。而秘者之手也赐予了他至高的荣耀。”
languages.original_text: "The Undying One has already whispered his name. And the Domin's hand bestowed upon him the greatest of all honours."

traits.locale_text: “不死之神已悄然道出他的名字。而秘者之手也赐予了他至高的荣耀。”

languages.text: "Ölmeyen onun adını çoktan fısıldadı. Domin'in eli, ona onurların en büyüğünü bahşetti."
languages.original_text: "The Undying One has already whispered his name. And the Domin's hand bestowed upon him the greatest of all honours."

traits.locale_text: "Ölmeyen onun adını çoktan fısıldadı. Domin'in eli, ona onurların en büyüğünü bahşetti."

languages.text: « L'Immortel a déjà murmuré son nom et la main {mf|du|de la} Domin lui a conféré le plus grand des honneurs. »
languages.original_text: "The Undying One has already whispered his name. And the Domin's hand bestowed upon him the greatest of all honours."

traits.locale_text: « L'Immortel a déjà murmuré son nom et la main {mf|du|de la} Domin lui a conféré le plus grand des honneurs. »

languages.text: «El Inmortal ya ha susurrado su nombre. Y la mano de{mf|l| la} Domin le ha concedido el mayor de los honores».
languages.original_text: "The Undying One has already whispered his name. And the Domin's hand bestowed upon him the greatest of all honours."

traits.locale_text: «El Inmortal ya ha susurrado su nombre. Y la mano de{mf|l| la} Domin le ha concedido el mayor de los honores».

languages.text: "Der Todlose hat bereits seinen Namen geflüstert. Und die Hand {mf|des|der} Domin hat ihm die größte aller Ehren gewährt."
languages.original_text: "The Undying One has already whispered his name. And the Domin's hand bestowed upon him the greatest of all honours."

traits.locale_text: "Der Todlose hat bereits seinen Namen geflüstert. Und die Hand {mf|des|der} Domin hat ihm die größte aller Ehren gewährt."

languages.text: 「不死の者よ、彼の名をすでにささやいた。そしてドミンの手は彼に最高の栄誉を与えた。」
languages.original_text: "The Undying One has already whispered his name. And the Domin's hand bestowed upon him the greatest of all honours."

traits.locale_text: 「不死の者よ、彼の名をすでにささやいた。そしてドミンの手は彼に最高の栄誉を与えた。」
